label: hetzner-cx23-1b
notes: Assumes a Qwen2.5 1.5B-class Q4 model on a Hetzner CX23-class 2 vCPU / 4 GB x86 VPS.
Run against the ray.1b profile or a tuned descendant using the 1B email workload.
Latency thresholds are intentionally looser than the sub-1B baselines because this profile favors output quality on the same 4 GB class.
